item.title: [Detected] users unable to save new dives; some existing dives also affected
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
Our internal monitors have detected an increase in server-side error messages immediately following a release. We are currently investigating the issue. So far a limited number of customers appear to be affected but the full impact is unknown.

item.title: [Investigating] users unable to save new dives; some existing dives also affected
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
Following a code release at approximately 23:00 UTC, most customers are unable to create new dives and may experience errors when loading existing dives. We are continuing to investigate the root cause.

item.title: [Investigating] users unable to save new dives; some existing dives also affected
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
We believe we have identified the root cause and are working to validate a fix. We believe the fix will be deployed within 2 hours.

item.title: [Resolved] users unable to save new dives; some existing dives also affected
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
This incident has been resolved.

item.title: [Investigating] MotherDuck Remote MCP Server is currently unavailable
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
The MotherDuck remote MCP server is currently unavailable, we are investigating the issue.

item.title: [Resolved] MotherDuck Remote MCP Server is currently unavailable
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
This issue has been resolved, the MCP server is available.

item.title: [Resolved] DuckLake Snapshot Deletions
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
A bug was introduced during our recent production release at 7:24 UTC on Thursday, February 12 that has resulted in the premature deletion of ducklake snapshots in MotherDuck-managed ducklake S3 Buckets. We have identified the root cause and deployed a patch at approx 17:50 UTC.

item.title: [Detected] Intermittent Connection issues with Web UI
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
We are investigating intermittent connection issues with the MotherDuck web UI.
Some notebook users are experiencing an error while loading attached databases. We're actively investigating. In the meantime, affected users can access their databases through other MotherDuck clients,...

item.title: [Investigating] Intermittent Connection issues with Web UI
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
We have found the cause and are working on a mitigation.

item.title: [Investigating] Intermittent Connection issues with Web UI
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
We have identified the problem and are working on deploying the fix for all customers.

item.title: [Investigating] Intermittent Connection issues with Web UI
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
We are in the process of deploying a fix.

item.title: [Investigating] Intermittent Connection issues with Web UI
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
We're in the process of deploying the fix.

item.title: [Resolved] Intermittent Connection issues with Web UI
item.description:
Affected: MotherDuck App
We've resolved the issue. The MotherDuck UI should be working as expected. If you have the UI in a browser tab, feel free to refresh the page.

item.title: [Investigating] Applications with Wasm SDK versions 0.7 or older encountering errors
item.description: We've identified the root cause and are investigating a fix.

item.title: [Resolved] Applications with Wasm SDK versions 0.7 or older encountering errors
item.description: We've resolved the issue. Older Wasm SDK versions should work as expected.
